name: Leona

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Sunlight
passive.description_source: Innate:  Leona's abilities briefly mark enemies hit.

effects.description: Innate: Leona's abilities mark enemies hit for 2.5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits. Allied champions' damaging attacks and abilities against a marked target will consume the mark to deal 32 : 165 (based on level) bonus magic damage.

passive.description: Innate: Leona's abilities mark enemies hit for 2.5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits. Allied champions' damaging attacks and abilities against a marked target will consume the mark to deal 32 : 165 (based on level) bonus magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Sunlight's damage respects enchantment redirection.

basic_ability_1.name: Shield of Daybreak
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Leona illuminates her shield, causing her next  basic attack within a few seconds to deal bonus magic damage and briefly  stun the target.

effects.context_notes: Active: Leona illuminates her shield, empowering her next basic attack within 6 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus magic damage and stun the target for 1 second.

effects.description: Shield of Daybreak resets Leona's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Leona illuminates her shield, empowering her next basic attack within 6 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal bonus magic damage and stun the target for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The enhanced attack will apply other on-hit effects and can critically strike as normal.
Manual review (2026-02-24): Shield of Daybreak is cast-gated and attack-cadence-coupled; cast primes the empowered attack and stun/damage resolve on hit, not on input press.
Manual review (2026-02-24): The empowered strike keeps normal basic-attack windup and can still interact with regular on-hit/critical rules before stun resolution is applied.

basic_ability_2.name: Eclipse
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Leona raises her guard for a short time, gaining flat damage reduction,  bonus armor and  bonus magic resistance.

effects.context_notes: Active: Leona raises her guard for 3 seconds, gaining flat damage reduction of up to 50% of the damage instance and bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
Active: Leona raises her guard for 3 seconds, gaining flat damage reduction of up to 50% of the damage instance and bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
Active: Leona raises her guard for 3 seconds, gaining flat damage reduction of up to 50% of the damage instance and bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
Her shield detonates after the duration, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Leona raises her guard for 3 seconds, gaining flat damage reduction of up to 50% of the damage instance and bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Neither the cast nor detonation of Eclipse interrupts any of Leona's previous orders or ongoing attack windups.

basic_ability_3.name: Zenith Blade
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Leona projects her sword in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Leona projects her sword in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: If she hits at least one enemy champion, she will dash 225 units behind the last one struck within 3000 range and root them for 0.5 seconds.
Leona is unable to move or attack while Zenith Blade is in flight. She can cast any of her abilities during the dash.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Leona projects her sword in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Leona will be ordered to basic attack the target.

ultimate.name: Solar Flare
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Leona calls down a solar flare that strikes upon the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Leona calls down a solar flare that strikes upon the target location after 0.625 seconds, granting sight of the area before impact and for another 3 seconds afterwards. Enemies hit are dealt magic damage.

effects.description: Targets are also slowed by 80% for 1.75 seconds, or stunned for the same duration if they are hit by the epicenter.

ultimate.description: Active: Leona calls down a solar flare that strikes upon the target location after 0.625 seconds, granting sight of the area before impact and for another 3 seconds afterwards. Enemies hit are dealt magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Solar Flare's visual effects are only visible to enemies if they have sight of the area it was cast upon.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Shield of Daybreak cast-to-hit timing, attack-reset cadence, and empowered-hit stun resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
